title: wax config v1
description: Repository wax configuration. Canonical path is .wax/wax.config.json; legacy .waxrc is still accepted. The $id remains waxrc.v1 for editor and tooling compatibility.

adoption.description: Adoption Metrics v2 scan behavior and reporting limits.

track_local_invocations.description: Parser-backed packs emit local invocation facts. false is reserved for a future reporting-gap mode.

track_unresolved_invocations.description: Parser-backed packs emit unresolved UI invocation facts. false is reserved for a future reporting-gap mode.

enabled.description: Usage sites include parent scope attribution. false is reserved for a future reporting-gap mode.

scope_visibility.description: Which parent scope visibilities are included in attribution.

candidate_policy.description: Candidates are reported separately from the primary adoption numerator and denominator. Other policies are reserved.

enabled.description: Derived symbol_usage_summary rows are emitted. false is reserved for a future reporting-gap mode.

parent_scope_limit.description: null emits all parent rows; 0 emits none; N limits rows per symbol.

design_system_registry.description: Deprecated. Use registry instead. When both registry and design_system_registry are set, registry wins at runtime.
